_doc: Cinatra dev-mode fixture coverage manifest. Classifies every cinatra.* table
by how (or whether) it is populated. The advisory audit gate at
scripts/audit/seed-coverage-gate.mjs walks the live DB and joins against this
file: rows in DB with no manifest entry warn ADD-TO-MANIFEST; rows classified
fixture-driven with count < minRows warn GAP; rows classified retired with
count > 0 warn STALE; rows classified boot-registered with count = 0 hint
fixture-driven      — seeded by scripts/seed.mjs (canonical demo data)
boot-registered     — registered on Next.js boot from on-disk OAS/manifests
user-created        — populated by real user actions
credential-sensitive — encrypted tokens / real credentials; never seed
connector-instance  — comes from the real install flow; never seed
runtime-event       — append-only event/audit ledger; never seed
runtime-dependent   — needs runtime-created parent rows; defer to a future post-boot seed
computed            — produced by matchers/reducers; never seed
retired             — table dropped; do not seed
When adding a new domain table that the UI surfaces, add an entry below.
See AGENTS.md for the recurrence rule.

tables.name: agent_campaign_overrides
tables.reason: Per-campaign agent overrides — written by the campaigns runtime, not the seed.

tables.name: agent_forks
tables.reason: Forks of agent templates — created via the registry UI.

tables.name: agent_registry_entries
tables.reason: Re-registered on `pnpm dev` boot from the agents/ tree.

tables.name: agent_run_hitl_prompts
tables.reason: HITL prompts captured during real agent runs.

tables.name: agent_run_messages
tables.reason: Messages written by real agent runs; agent_runs is TRUNCATEd by the seed.

tables.name: agent_run_skills_used
tables.reason: Per-run skill invocation ledger; runtime-emitted.

tables.name: agent_run_trigger_waits
tables.reason: In-flight WayFlow trigger-wait state.

tables.name: agent_run_triggers
tables.reason: Per-run trigger gate (immediate/scheduled/recurring); one row per dispatched run.

tables.name: agent_runs
tables.reason: Created by real agent execution via /api/llm-bridge / BullMQ. TRUNCATEd by seed.

tables.name: agent_share_bindings
tables.reason: Share/install bindings created by the registry install flow.

tables.name: agent_template_versions
tables.reason: Re-registered on `pnpm dev` boot.

tables.name: agent_templates
tables.reason: Re-registered on `pnpm dev` boot from agents/<vendor>/<slug>/cinatra/oas.json.

tables.name: agent_versions
tables.reason: Re-registered on `pnpm dev` boot alongside agent_templates.

tables.name: anthropic_skill_lease
tables.reason: Anthropic skill lease state — runtime-emitted.

tables.name: anthropic_skill_sync
tables.reason: Anthropic skill sync log.

tables.name: artifact_audit
tables.reason: Append-only artifact audit ledger.

tables.name: artifact_blobs
tables.reason: Blob metadata written by real artifact uploads.

tables.name: artifact_provider_cache
tables.reason: Provider artifact cache; runtime-managed.

tables.name: artifact_refs
tables.reason: Replay-safe artifact pins; written by chat/agent/workflow consumers.

tables.name: audit_events
tables.reason: Append-only audit-event ledger.

tables.name: authoring_invocation_ledger
tables.reason: Authoring invocation provenance — append-only.

tables.name: campaigns
tables.reason: Email campaigns live in the objects substrate as @cinatra-ai/campaigns:campaign rows; this legacy table is empty by design.

tables.name: chat_threads
tables.surface: /chat (fictional user-owned demo threads only — admin's history untouched)

tables.name: connector_access_policy
tables.reason: Written by the connector install/share flow.

tables.name: custom_skill_assignments
tables.reason: Per-agent skill assignments — written by the skills surface.

tables.name: drafts
tables.reason: Email-send + workflow drafts; generic JSONL payload. Created at runtime by the drafting flow.

tables.name: dynamic_object_types
tables.reason: Registered on Next.js boot via registerObjectType().

tables.name: email_send_events
tables.reason: Append-only delivery-attempt ledger; FK to agent_runs (wiped by seed).

tables.name: extension_accent_color
tables.reason: Per-extension UI accent; set via the extension settings page.

tables.name: extension_access_policy
tables.reason: Access policy rows are written by the install flow alongside the credential set.

tables.name: extension_co_owners
tables.reason: Co-owner grants written by /extensions share UI.

tables.name: extension_destinations
tables.reason: Encrypted token/IV columns; provisioned via the real registry-destination install flow.

tables.name: extension_lifecycle_audit
tables.reason: Append-only extension lifecycle audit log.

tables.name: external_mcp_servers
tables.reason: External MCP servers are credential-bound and registered via the real install flow (Nango-backed for Apify; OAuth/admin form for others).

tables.name: graphiti_projection_outbox
tables.reason: Graphiti projection outbox; reducer-managed.

tables.name: legacy_costs
tables.reason: Legacy cost rows from earlier metrics pipeline; not actively written.

tables.name: metadata
tables.reason: Schema-level metadata; runtime-managed.

tables.name: model_pricing
tables.reason: Re-registered on Next.js boot from the pricing JSON.

tables.name: notifications
tables.reason: Notification feed populated by real triggers (HITL, run-status, role grants).

tables.name: object_connector_configs
tables.reason: Renamed to object_sync_adapter_configs in drizzle-store.ts; legacy rows remain in older DBs.

tables.name: object_sync_adapter_configs
tables.reason: Connector sync adapter configs come from the real WordPress/Drupal install flow.

tables.name: path_relocations
tables.reason: Object path relocation ledger.

tables.name: project_agent_template_bindings
tables.reason: Project-pinned agent templates; needs boot-registered agent_template IDs.

tables.name: project_resource_refs
tables.reason: Per-resource project bindings; written when a resource is moved into a project.

tables.name: record_activities
tables.reason: Per-record activity ledger; runtime-emitted.

tables.name: representation
tables.reason: Append-only via the real artifact path; raw inserts would produce semantically invalid pins.

tables.name: resource
tables.reason: Artifact resource rows; written by the artifact runtime.

tables.name: resource_project_moves
tables.reason: Move ledger; runtime-emitted.

tables.name: review_tasks
tables.reason: Table DROPped in drizzle-store.ts:189; do not seed.

tables.name: planned_actions
tables.reason: Table DROPped in drizzle-store.ts:190; do not seed.

tables.name: run_co_owners
tables.reason: Per-run co-owner grants written by the share UI.

tables.name: run_context_selections
tables.reason: Per-run context selections; runtime-emitted.

tables.name: semantic_assertion
tables.reason: Append-only artifact semantic assertion ledger.

tables.name: service_accounts
tables.reason: Service-account credentials; provisioned via the real install/admin flow.

tables.name: skill_co_owners
tables.reason: Skill co-owner grants written by the skill share UI.

tables.name: skill_match_batch_runs
tables.reason: Skill matcher batch run state; computed by the matcher.

tables.name: skill_match_schedule
tables.reason: Skill matcher schedule.

tables.name: skill_matches
tables.reason: Skill-to-agent matches computed by the matcher.

tables.name: skill_package_co_owners
tables.reason: Skill package co-owners.

tables.name: skill_packages
tables.reason: Re-registered on Next.js boot from the catalog.

tables.name: skills
tables.reason: Re-registered on Next.js boot.

tables.name: startup_overrides
tables.reason: Per-startup overrides written via the CRM detail page.

tables.name: traces
tables.reason: Observability traces; runtime-emitted.

tables.name: usage_events
tables.reason: Usage/cost events; runtime-emitted.
